title: C15 MRI DIAGNOSTICS & IMAGING
heading: C15 MRI DIAGNOSTICS & IMAGING CENTRE
text:
C15 MRI DIAGNOSTICS & IMAGING Home About Us Services Health Packages Contact C15 MRI DIAGNOSTICS & IMAGING CENTRE A State of the Art Diagnostic Centre located in Green Park, Delhi Call Us Email Us Our services M.R.I. M.R.I. or Magnetic Resonance Imaging is a painless, safe and non-invasive test without the use of any ionizing radiation. It uses a magnetic field and radio waves to create high-quality dimensional images of the body part and assists in examining the anatomy of the body part. MultiSlice CT Scan/Advance Body CT/Cardiac CT/Angiography CT Scan – sometimes called a CAT Scan – is short-form (acronym) for a Computerized Axial Tomography Scan. A CT Scan typically combines multiple rotating X-Rays along with hi-end computerized processing to produce a more detailed picture of the inner structures of a body – including bones, tissues and organs. A CT Scan offers significantly greater detail and clarity as compared to a regular X-Ray HRCT CHEST SCAN COVID-19 is a Respiratory Disease primarily affecting the lungs, and imaging of lungs done by a HRCT (High Resolution Computed Tomography) Scan is a more sensitive and specific investigation compared to the RT-PCR test. HRCT Scan can reveal the extent of damage done to lungs and can be used as an effective tool to provide physicians more options for better disease management Health Packages BRONZE PACKAGE ₹2000 CBC (14) | BSF | LFT (10) | KFT (4) | LIPID PROFILE (6) | TFT (3) | USG WHOLE ABDOMEN | ECG | CHEST X-RAY Total Parameters: 41 Book Now SILVER PACKAGE ₹3100 CBC (14) | BSF | HbA1C | LFT (10) | KFT (4) | LIPID PROFILE (6) | TFT (3) | IRON PANEL (3) | USG WHOLE ABDOMEN | ECG | CHEST X-RAY | Total Parameters: 44 Book Now GOLD PACKAGE ₹3900 CBC (14) | BSF | HbA1C | LFT (10) | KFT (4) | LIPID PROFILE (6) | TFT (3) | IRON PANEL (3) | VIT B12 | VIT D| TESTOSTERONE | USG WHOLE ABDOMEN | ECG | CHEST X-RAY | Total Parameters: 48 Book Now PLATINUM PACKAGE ₹4900 CARDIAC PANEL (5) | COMPLETE VITAMIN PROFILE (14) | DIABETIC SCREEN (2) | ELEMENT (TOXIC AND NUTRIENT) (22) | CBC (24) | BSF | HbA1C | LFT (11) | KFT (5) | LIPID PROFILE (8) | TFT (3) | IRON PANEL (3) | USG WHOLE ABDOMEN | ECG | CHEST X-RAY | HOMOCYSTEINE | S.
